calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Leathley.
Jeff Rosen, Esq. for Petitioner: Michael Chen, present as Guardian at litem for: Jackie Chen and Mimi Chen, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved for each minor.
No Fees or Costs
A net balance of $1,000.00 for each minor to be held in trust for the benefit of the minor until the minor reaches majority.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
